## PiWsSandboxConfig interface

Pi subprocess isolation settings.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PiWsSandboxConfig
```

## Remarks

`process` mode does not enforce filesystem access restrictions by itself. It only isolates cwd, HOME, TMPDIR, and the forwarded environment. Use `system` mode with an external wrapper command when you need OS-enforced directory isolation.
